name: Benihana Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend until the mixture is almost smooth.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
4. Makes approximately 6 servings, about 2 tablespoons plus 2 teaspoons per serving.
5. Unused portions can be stored in a covered container in the refrigerator.
